siteMeta.title: Conqueror Fitness Hub — Rise. Conquer. Transform.
siteMeta.description: Conqueror Fitness Hub — Jalgaon's most premium gym. Fully AC, steam room, advanced machines, certified trainers. 4.9★ Google rated.

contactInfo.address: Madhuvimal Plaza, 2nd Floor, Opp. Dadawadi Temple (Dalchini Hotel), Dadawadi, Jalgaon — 425001, MH

hero.subtitle: Jalgaon's most premium fitness club — fully AC, steam room, advanced machines, and certified coaches who deliver real results.

paragraphs: Conqueror Fitness Hub is Jalgaon's benchmark for premium fitness. Located at Madhuvimal Plaza — we've built a space where discipline meets comfort, and every member gets results they can actually see.
Whether you're a beginner starting your first session or an athlete training for competition, our environment elevates every workout. No compromises. No excuses.

features.title: Full AC Facility
features.description: Comfortable every season — train in ideal conditions always.

features.title: Steam Room
features.description: Premium post-workout recovery for faster muscle repair.

features.title: Advanced Machines
features.description: Latest equipment for every muscle group, always maintained.

features.title: Expert Trainers
features.description: Certified coaches focused 100% on your results.

timings.description: Two dedicated batches — morning for early risers, evening for working professionals. Come when it suits you.

batches.name: Morning Batch
batches.note: 6 hours of morning excellence. Best for students, early risers, and those who train before the city wakes up.

batches.name: Evening Batch
batches.note: 5 high-energy evening hours. Perfect for working professionals who own their post-work hours.

timings.closedNote: Sunday: The gym is closed. Rest day — your muscles will thank you for it.

items.title: AC Gym Floor
items.desc: Every square foot is air-conditioned. Train at 5 AM or 8 PM — the environment is always ideal, even during peak Maharashtra summer.

items.title: Steam Room
items.desc: Premium steam therapy accelerates muscle recovery, improves circulation, and leaves you completely refreshed after every intense session.

items.title: Advanced Equipment
items.desc: Latest machines targeting every muscle group. Properly maintained, always functional — zero compromises on your workout quality.

items.title: Free Weights Zone
items.desc: Complete collection of dumbbells, barbells, kettlebells, and Olympic plates. A dedicated zone built for serious strength training.

items.title: Cardio Section
items.desc: Treadmills, ellipticals, and exercise bikes — a full cardio zone for fat burn and endurance. Included in every membership at no extra charge.

items.title: Personal Training
items.desc: Certified trainers provide 1-on-1 guidance with custom workout plans, real-time form correction, and consistent motivation tailored to your goals.

pricing.subtitle: Starting at ₹800/month. No hidden charges. No fine print.

bmi.description: Body Mass Index is the first step in understanding your fitness journey. Calculate it here — free, instant, and honest. Then let our trainers build a plan around your number.

items.quote: "Jalgaon's best gym without a doubt. The equipment is top-class and the trainers are genuinely helpful. AC makes every session comfortable even in peak summer."
"The steam room facility is excellent — after an intense workout it's perfect for recovery. Trainers are knowledgeable and genuinely invested in your progress."
"Lost 8 kg in 3 months. The morning batch starting at 5 AM is perfect for my schedule. Great atmosphere and community — nothing else in Jalgaon comes close."
"All machines are advanced and always well-maintained. Never had to wait for something to get fixed. Cleanliness standards are absolutely exceptional."
"The trainer corrected my form completely. My results improved dramatically after the very first month. Best investment I have ever made for my health."
"Affordable pricing with truly premium facilities. Honestly, nothing in Jalgaon comes close. Very happy I joined — highly recommended to absolutely everyone."

footer.brandDesc: Jalgaon's #1 premium fitness hub. Advanced equipment, certified trainers, fully AC with steam room — everything you need, all under one roof.
footer.copy: © 2026 Conqueror Fitness Hub, Jalgaon. All rights reserved.
